subcodes.first_line: We make mention of him who hath been named Núru'lláh, that he may rejoice in the remembrance of his Lord and be of them whom nothing deterreth in God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من سمی بنورالله لیفرح بذکر مولاه و یکون من الذین لایاخذهم فی الله
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant
